post.summary:
Create a new booking (clients only)
POST /api/bookings

put.summary:
Update booking status
PUT /api/bookings/{id}
Workers can: accept, reject
Clients can: cancel
Both can: completed

message.const: Only the client can cancel this booking
Only the assigned worker can accept or reject
